I will search for the official English name of "築間集團" to ensure the translation is accurate and professional. Hsi-Chen Dim Sum by Jhujian Group

Xi Chen Hong Kong Style Dim Sum & Tea Restaurant (Taichung Dali)

← Back to all restaurants
★★★★★ 4
📍 Dali District, Taichung📅 2026
Hong Kong Style HK Cafe Dim Sum Congee
Xichen Dim Sum Tea Restaurant is the latest venture from the Zhujian Catering Group as they dive into the world of Hong Kong-style eats. They’ve brought in Chef Huang Yi-ren—famously known as the "In-ge of Dim Sum" (a nod to a popular, reliable TV character) for his 30+ years of expertise—to lead the kitchen. Everything here is handmade and steamed to order, ensuring every bite is spot on. The Dali branch in Taichung is right on Defang South Road, featuring a bright, airy space that’s just right for big family dinners or sharing a spread with friends. Getting dim sum right is all about the timing and the "hand-feel" of the chef, and they take that craft seriously here. You’ll want to try their signature Three-Flavor Siu Mai (a killer combo of scallop, truffle, and caviar), the Five-Treasure Rice, or the savory Chu Hou Beef Offal Noodles. For the Instagram crowd, the "Avalanche" Hong Kong French Toast is a must-order, along with those adorable penguin-shaped buns filled with brown sugar and chewy mochi (or "QQ" as we call that bouncy texture in Taiwan). To wash it all down, they’ve got classics like Silk Stocking Iced Milk Tea and a unique Watermelon Tieguanyin tea. Perfect for family gatherings, catching up with friends, and hardcore dim sum fans. It’s a sister location to the branch over at Showtime Live near the Taichung train station.
Good for Family gatherings Catching up with friends Hardcore dim sum fans

House specialties

Xichen Triple-Flavor Shumai (Scallop, Truffle, Roe; Xichen Sanwei Shaomai) Xichen Five Treasures Rice (Xichen Wubao Fan) Chu Hou Braised Beef Offal Noodles (Zhuhou Niuza Mian) "Earth-Shattering" Falling Rock Hong Kong Style French Toast (Tianbeng Dilie Luoshi Xi-Duoshi) Penguin Brown Sugar Chewy Buns (Penguin Brown Sugar QQ Bao)

What I ordered

Steamed Wagyu Beef Balls with Bean Curd Skin (Xianzhu Wagyu Qiu) Rose Soy-Poached Chicken Drumstick (Meigui Youjitui) Clear Broth Beef Brisket Soup (Qingdun Niunan Tang) Beef and Egg Congee (Huadan Niurou Zhou) Mango Pomelo Sago (Yangzhi Ganlu)

Dishes

Restaurant info

Address No. 472, Defang S. Rd., Dali Dist., Taichung City 412, Taiwan Open in Google Maps →
Phone04-2481-0081
HoursWeekdays 11:00-14:30 / 17:00-22:00; weekends & holidays 11:00-22:00
ClosedOpen daily
ReservationsReservations accepted (線上 inline 訂位)
Service+10% service charge
PriceNT$ 300-500 / person
CuisineHong Kong Style・HK Cafe・Dim Sum・Congee
